scripts.build: pnpm --filter @webhook-flow/shared build && pnpm --filter @webhook-flow/api build && pnpm --filter @webhook-flow/mock-receiver build && pnpm --filter @webhook-flow/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @webhook-flow/shared test && pnpm --filter @webhook-flow/api test && pnpm --filter @webhook-flow/mock-receiver test && pnpm --filter @webhook-flow/web test
